name: Las Vegas Credit Repair Leaders
description_short: Las Vegas-based credit repair firm specializing in dispute resolution, collection removal, and credit report cleanup through unlimited disputes and validation letters.
description_long:
Community Credit Repair (operating as Las Vegas Credit Repair Leaders) is a credit repair company based in Las Vegas, Nevada, offering in-person consultations and dispute services. The company operates from a physical location at 2375 S. Jones Blvd and accepts walk-ins Monday through Friday, 8am-6pm. They position themselves as credit repair specialists focused on disputing negative items and errors on credit reports.

The company's core service model centers on unlimited disputes, unlimited validation letters, and unlimited settlements as part of their credit repair packages. Their consultation process includes soft pulls of all three credit reports, analysis for fastest score increases, and identification of removable items under credit laws. Services explicitly listed include collections removal, charge-off removal, late payment removal, repossession removal, judgment removal, tax lien removal, bankruptcy removal, and inquiry removal.

Community Credit Repair distinguishes itself by emphasizing face-to-face consultations and a local presence rather than purely online operations. They advertise shorter service terms (24-36 months) and claim to base fees on savings achieved rather than total debt balances. The company also offers ancillary services including credit coaching, identity restoration, and student loan guidance, suggesting a broader debt-related service scope beyond traditional credit repair.

However, the website presents several concerns. The site conflates credit repair with debt consolidation and debt settlement services—distinct business models with different legal frameworks. The navigation menu and content blur distinctions between credit disputes (legitimate) and services like debt consolidation and settlement (which are debt-relief services). The claims about fee structures and savings lack specific documentation. No information is provided about credit repair licensing requirements, CROA compliance certifications, or dispute success rates.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free in-person consultations with soft pulls of all three credit reports included
Offers unlimited disputes and unlimited validation letters (not per-item caps)
Physical office location in Las Vegas with walk-in availability and extended hours (8am-6pm weekdays)
Explicitly lists collection removal, charge-off removal, judgment removal, and tax lien removal as services
Includes credit coaching and identity restoration services alongside core credit repair
Claims fee structure based on savings achieved rather than percentage of total debt
cons: Website conflates credit repair with debt settlement/consolidation—legally and functionally different services
No displayed credentials, CROA compliance certifications, or licensing information for credit repair
No dispute success rates, timeline expectations, or case examples provided
No clear explanation of how 'fees based on savings' are calculated or what the actual fee percentage is
Services listed (bankruptcy removal, eviction removal) may overstate what credit repair can legally accomplish
best_for: Las Vegas residents seeking face-to-face credit repair consultation and local service
Consumers with multiple negative items (collections, charge-offs, late payments) wanting unlimited dispute attempts
Individuals who prefer in-person interaction and want a soft credit pull review before committing
diagnosis: Best for Las Vegas-area consumers seeking local, in-person credit repair with unlimited disputes and validation services. Primary caveat: website conflates distinct services (credit repair vs. debt settlement), lacks transparency on fees and dispute success rates, and does not display CROA compliance or licensing credentials—standard markers of legitimate credit repair firms.
services: Credit report disputes and error removal
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
